title: [Calyx] Add Combinational Components
body:
Add calyx combinational components as described here: https://github.com/cucapra/calyx/issues/1054.

Combinational components function essentially the same as combinational primitives, but allow them to be written directly in the Calyx dialect. Combinational components have no control or groups, only assigns. They also only contain other combinational cells.

This is accomplished by introducing a new ComponentInterface, which CombComponentOp and ComponentOp implement.

The main use case here is in simplifying the generation of Calyx by reusing large combinational portions of the design.
